name: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
allowed_use_boundary: Use as external LLM-application risk and vulnerability guidance crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications can support LLM-application risk, vulnerability, and mitigation comparison.
OWASP risk categories can be mapped to review posture, evidence posture, governance boundary, drift, and fail-closed terms.
non_claims: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications does not prove transition admissibility.
OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications does not grant execution authority inside StegVerse.
Security-risk review may support evidence and review posture, but review does not become authority.

transition_table_mapping.allowed_use_boundary: LLM-application risk and vulnerability guidance crosswalk evidence only
transition_table_mapping.claims: risk categories, vulnerability classes, mitigation guidance, and LLM application security review context
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof, certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority
transition_table_mapping.input_artifact_type: risk category, vulnerability, mitigation, or application-security guidance reference
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: external security-guidance posture; no StegVerse authority inherited
transition_table_mapping.evidence_model: risk categories, vulnerability descriptions, mitigations, and supporting control context
transition_table_mapping.policy_or_rule_model: mitigation and risk-control policy reference comparison
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source plus crosswalk can reconstruct LLM-application risk-context relationship limits
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: may inform evidence and review posture, not standing determination
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: Evidence Posture, Review Posture, Governance Boundary, Drift, Policy Reference, Fail-Closed behavior
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, undefined mapping, stale risk context, unresolved mitigation status, or authority overclaim

SPE_overlap.authority_evaluation: not performed by OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications

fail_closed_conditions: risk context is stale or insufficient
any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
